details: The agent successfully navigated to the MAINTAINERS file but misidentified the first maintainer. The agent reported Steffen Klassert (3C59X NETWORK DRIVER), which is the first entry in the alphabetical section. However, the known fact states that Linus Torvalds is listed as the overall maintainer at the top of the file. The agent missed the top-level Linux kernel maintainer entry and instead returned the first alphabetical subsystem entry.
